title: Disney Dumbo Magical Beginnings 4' x 6' Baby Photo Album DI281, 200 g
description: Product Description Dumbo disney baby photo album capture your baby's most precious moments in this adorable disney inspired dumbo photo album. from your baby's very first photo to their very first smile, this little dumbo album is the perfect way to treasure those lovely photos for years to come. with a beautiful design and a gorgeous ribbon at its side, this lovely album is a great way of capturing the sweet innocence of your baby's first years. whether you're looking for the perfect baby shower gift, or you're soon to be expecting your own little bundle of joy, this delightful dumbo album is the perfect way to welcome a baby into the world and create your own treasure trove of memories. Box Contains 1 x item
